title: New Kanban - Visible Clocks

posts.author: vjabbinante13 (Vito Abbinante)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love that Monday.com is trying the improve the product with new features, improvements, etc., but…how can a feature that already existed be considered “improved” if it can’t do the things the previous version could?

I’m currently using a Kanban view as my main view for most of my jobs/items, and my item card has a clock on it. I like the new Kanban view, but…no clocks. Again, if the old version had it, why would it be removed on the “improvement”? It’s not like a function that became superfluous or overkill was removed…actual functionality was changed, and not for the better. While the new tiles generally look better, give me function over fashion.

Long story long, my feature request is to put clocks back on the item tiles in Kanban view…along with anything else I may not be using but may have been removed from functionality.
